Label: hydrolase activity, acting on ester bonds
Rationale: Redundant (subsumed by GO:0016787+GO:0004521); off-branch (not ancestor of GO:0004521 in current GO); mechanistically lyase-like not hydrolase

Label: RNA endonuclease activity
Rationale: Most specific applicable term; experimentally supported; direct in-vitro cleavage in ortholog (PMID 11780124)

Label: hydrolase activity
Rationale: Generic; conceptually subsumed by GO:0004521; housekeeping

Label: protein serine/threonine kinase activity
Rationale: Second catalytic activity (kinase); transferase, not hydrolase

Label: IRE1-mediated unfolded protein response
Rationale: Downstream process, not the MF under test
